reasoning: The deployment of the Coalition of the Willing (COW) is explicitly contingent on a ceasefire or peace agreement ("the day after a ceasefire"). As of the November 9, 2025 knowledge cutoff, no ceasefire has been enacted (despite earlier proposals in March, mid-2025 reports indicate no ceasefire holds). While operational plans and command structures are finalized and 26 countries have formally committed as of September, the short timeframe remaining in 2025 (under two months) makes the sequence of reaching a durable ceasefire agreement AND physically deploying forces into Ukraine before December 31 highly unlikely. Even with pre-planning, securing a negotiated peace between Ukraine and Russia is complex and time-consuming, and bureaucratic/logistical friction in multinational rapid deployments further dampens the odds of deployment occurring strictly within the 2025 calendar year. Therefore, a low probability is warranted.
